reveal.motto: AplusZ.app — the search is free as air, so you fly for less.
reveal.statement: Some things should be like air — genuinely useful, and free to everyone. A handful of large companies sit between you and the sky, and most people have no real choice but to accept whatever they're shown. AplusZ.app gives that sight back, for free. No signup, no markup. It even works without an internet connection — once AplusZ.app is loaded, you can find the best fares offline, anywhere. When running costs are covered, AplusZ.app stays free for everyone, for good.
reveal.free_line: Free forever · No signup · Price never marked up · Works offline
reveal.founder: “I always wanted to build something useful and free — like air. This is it.”
reveal.press_body: Covering travel, tech, or consumer tools? We'd love to hear from you. Get in touch directly — journalists who visit us get 6 months fully unlocked, on us.
reveal.press_gift: In-person visit = 6-month Pro+ gift, no strings.
reveal.comment_gift: Share your experience — if we feature your comment, you get free Pro or Pro+ access as a thank-you.

motto: AplusZ.app - the search is free as air, so you fly for less.

hiw.title: How it works
hiw.concept: A+Z.app is carefully designed to let you fly for {hl}LESS{/hl}. It has a charitable character at its core: the more people benefit from it, the better � once basic maintenance fees are covered, it becomes free for everyone. A maximum share with friends makes the "free for all" happen quicker.
hiw.foot: Your two cities are saved automatically � until you change them.

s2.head: Scan
s2.body: We sweep months of dates for the lowest fare.

s3.head: Book that flight
s3.body: Cheapest price + best day shown. 10-min timer before the price disappears.

alerts.title: My alerts
alerts.empty: No alerts yet. Tap "Remind me" on a result to add one.
alerts.sent: Reminder ready in your mail app.
alerts.limit_free: Free keeps 1 saved route, locked. Upgrade to Pro to swap routes (3 changes) or Pro+ for unlimited.
alerts.limit_pro: Pro allows 3 route changes � you have used them all. Upgrade to Pro+ for unlimited routes and swaps.
alerts.saved_where: It�s in your Profile, under Saved routes.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.saved_intro: Save a route, then re-send a reminder to your own mail anytime.
profile.reward: When this hits 100%, every paid plan becomes free for everyone until January 1 of next year.
profile.karma_msg: The more you share AplusZ, the faster the whole site � including Pro and Pro+ � becomes free for everyone.
profile.streak: Day streak � open or share AplusZ daily to keep it alive.

billboard.stat: This app scans up to 50,000 possible lowest prices across 2,000 airports and finds the lowest possible fare on the best date to book within the next 6 months.
